title: Wheel of Chance
writer: Fannie Hurst, Gerald C. Duffy, Garrett Graham
actors: Richard Barthelmess, Bodil Rosing, Warner Oland
plot: A Russian family, the Turkeltaubs, emigrates to the US before the Communist revolution that overthrew the Czar. One of their twin sons, Schulke, disappears and is believed dead before they leave. After they settle into their new c...
